profiles.name: Viridis Quantity Takeoff
profiles.description: Deterministic embodied-carbon quantity takeoff from a bill of materials; the measure step before Viridis GHG inventory and disclosure tooling.
representative_queries: measure construction materials for a carbon inventory

profiles.name: Viridis GHG Ledger
profiles.description: Deterministic Scope 1, 2, and 3 greenhouse-gas inventory with pinned factor packs; pairs with quantity takeoff upstream and disclosure compilation downstream.

profiles.name: Viridis Disclosure Compiler
profiles.description: CSRD, IFRS S2, and TCFD sustainability disclosure compilation from activity evidence; consumes GHG and tax outputs in the Viridis compliance chain.
representative_queries: compile an IFRS S2 climate disclosure

profiles.name: Viridis Tax Credit Engine
profiles.description: Auditable clean-energy tax-credit scenarios for 45Q, 45V, 45Y, 48E, and 45X; pairs with Viridis GHG inventory and compliance evidence.

profiles.name: Viridis Regulatory Radar
profiles.description: Regulatory horizon scan across an energy and climate compliance database; the scan step paired with Viridis carbon accounting, disclosure, and tax-credit agents.
representative_queries: what climate regulations apply to this company

profiles.name: EnergyAI
profiles.description: Free energy intelligence and a real homeowner-to-installer conversion rail for AI agents. Check incentives, estimate solar production, score an Energy Node, or return a ready-to-share get_quote_link. An authenticated referring agent keeps signed attribution through the homeowner assessment and earns a 20% bounty when an installer buys the resulting lead.
representative_queries: what clean energy incentives apply to this home
estimate solar production for a homeowner
get a homeowner a link to request installer quotes
